title: The Signatures Are Burned
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the signatures are burned.
scene: The scene follows the signatures are burned, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A TAMATEEBAKO ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right, Cap'n!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Apparently it's hidden somewhere in the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And it can cause anybody to age?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's what our Intel says!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could it, say, turn a teensy little brat... into a fully- grown, sexy lady?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't doubt it for a second.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is it, folks!! Problem solved!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: With that box, I can marry Princess Shirahoshii right away!! I know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Steal me that Tamatebako right away!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Well, the Palace is imperetrable. But if you were to marry Shirahoshii first...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd be able to get into the Palace no problem, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Man, you guys are smart!!! Baho hoh!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: ...that Shirahoshii is a cutie. I'd say with an extra ten or twenty years on her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She'd grow into a proper beauty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She'll get even more gigantic, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's big-boned, all right?! I ain't got nothin' against large ladies!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Once I'm Shirahoshii's husband... It will finally be mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The dream that my clan has sought after for generations!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Right!! Let's start writing the wedding invitations!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you going to propose first, Captain Becken?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aw, crap... I've got no friends...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The word of the world nobles holds great sway...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...even at the Reverie Council of Kings!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this is an official letter from a world noble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is what it says.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "For the sake of improving relations between humans and fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...I support the proposal ...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ...of the attached petition."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In other words...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: If we gather enough signatures to submit at the next Reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...then this piece of paper...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...will grant our proposal the strength to be realistically put into action!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our relocation to the surface is no mere dream !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tenryubito granted their support to the proposal ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't know what to think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As such, all that we need now...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ...is to gather more signatures.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can only wait for all of you to make your decisions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I beg of you to reach out for a life of harmony...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A life on the surface, where we can achieve true peace ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: children... I hope you do not mean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to grant me false hope and then take it back once more?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not this time!! My mum says she'll sign too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: When

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The queue starts here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Everybody line up properly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: no pushing in!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we're not going to get anywhere with a tiny box like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The next generation of the National

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many people do you think there are in this country ?!!

summary: The Signatures Are Burned. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
